GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Fast deterministic checks close to the module
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: API smoke tests via curl against running server
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: Full browser testing + real data on VM
GlobalPolicy.redaction: Never log API tokens, user prompt content, or raw LLM responses in full.

VF-001.NAME: Employee Report Instant
VF-001.scenario: (deprecated) Endpoint still callable via curl but no UI consumer
VF-001.expected-outcome: JSON response still well-formed if called externally

VF-002.NAME: Session Summarize On-Demand
VF-002.scenario: User opens detail modal for a generation with session_id, clicks '🧠 Анализ сессии целиком'
VF-002.expected-outcome: Summary text, topic, is_work classification — cached in session_summaries — second click instant

VF-004.NAME: Anomaly Detection
VF-004.scenario: (deprecated) Rule detection code present but no UI consumer
VF-004.expected-outcome: M-ANOMALY.detect() still returns anomaly list when called from code

VF-005.NAME: Per-generation AI analyze
VF-005.scenario: User clicks row → detail modal opens → AI block shows empty state → clicks '🧠 Проанализировать' → after ~2-3s block fills with topic/summary/project/meta
VF-005.expected-outcome: First call: LLM invoked, result saved, cached=false in response. Second call without force: cached=true, instant (<100ms), no LLM log marker. Force=true: re-invokes LLM, updates DB row.

VF-006.NAME: Summary prefetch on page load
VF-006.scenario: User opens dashboard, table renders, previously-analyzed rows show topic chip immediately without clicks
VF-006.expected-outcome: Single POST /api/generation-summaries with 50+ ids → returns {summaries: {id: ...}} for cached ones. AI cells reflect cache without any LLM call.

required-signals.no-log-marker: [GenSummarize][LLM] ok (must NOT appear on bare page load)

VF-007.NAME: Bulk analyze group
VF-007.scenario: User switches to '🧠 По темам AI' tab, clicks '🧠 Проанализировать (N)' in '🤖 Без AI-анализа' group with 10 rows
VF-007.expected-outcome: 10 POSTs to /api/generation/summarize via 3-worker pool. Button text progresses ⏳ 1/10 → ⏳ 10/10 → ✅ Готово (10/10). After completion, all 10 rows show analyzed chip; reloading page persists state (DB cache).

VF-008.NAME: Provider toggle switches runtime provider
VF-008.scenario: Page loads with default provider. User switches to alternate provider via sidebar radio. Next AI analysis uses new provider.
VF-008.expected-outcome: GET /api/provider/config returns current provider with model info. POST /api/provider/set with {provider: "ollama"} switches runtime. Next /api/generation/summarize uses Ollama (visible in log markers and response time). Switching back to "anthropic" restores Anthropic behavior.

VF-009.NAME: Parallel LLM + Embed stores both PostgreSQL and Qdrant
VF-009.scenario: User analyzes a generation for the first time. LLM call and embedding run in parallel. Result appears in both PostgreSQL and Qdrant.
VF-009.expected-outcome: Single POST /api/generation/summarize triggers parallel execution. PostgreSQL: generation_summaries row created (verifiable via psql). Qdrant: point stored in Polza_user_logs with 768-dim vector and payload (verifiable via Qdrant API or dashboard). Response includes cached=false and provider info. Second call returns cached=true from PostgreSQL.

VF-010.NAME: Persistent analyze-all survives restart
VF-010.scenario: User clicks '🧠 Анализ всех' → progress shows → user refreshes page → progress still visible → server restarts → analysis auto-resumes
VF-010.expected-outcome: GET /api/analysis-stats returns {total, analyzed, remaining, job: {status, done, startedAt}}. During analysis: job.status=running, remaining decreases. After page refresh: stats counter still visible, polling resumes. After server restart: 🔄 Resuming analyze-all in log, job continues from where stopped. Stop button pauses (not kills) — start button resumes.

VF-011.NAME: Auto-analyze triggers on new records
VF-011.scenario: AUTO_ANALYZE=true in .env. SyncWorker syncs new records. Auto-analyze callback processes them.
VF-011.expected-outcome: After sync: [AutoAnalyze] N new records to auto-analyze in log. Each new record gets LLM summary + Qdrant vector. Toggle OFF → no auto-analyze after sync. Toggle ON at runtime via /api/provider/set → works on next sync.

module-checks.check-2: PGPASSWORD=bond psql -h localhost -U dbadmin -d polza_dashboard -c "\d session_summaries" | head -20

scenarios.scenario-1: CREATE TABLE session_summaries succeeds on startup
scenarios.scenario-2: Upsert creates new summary, second upsert updates it
scenarios.scenario-3: get_or_none returns None for unknown session, cached for known

module-checks.check-1: python -c "from db import GenerationSummary, gen_summary_get_or_none, gen_summary_get_many, gen_summary_upsert, gen_summary_delete; print('imports OK')"
module-checks.check-2: PGPASSWORD=bond psql -h localhost -U dbadmin -d polza_dashboard -c "\d generation_summaries"
module-checks.check-3: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/generation-summaries -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"ids":["gen_000000"]}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'summaries' in d"

scenarios.scenario-1: Table created on startup via Base.metadata.create_all
scenarios.scenario-2: Upsert of new generation_id INSERTs; second upsert UPDATEs same row
scenarios.scenario-3: get_many returns {} for unknown ids, populated dict for cached ones
scenarios.scenario-4: delete removes row, next summarize call triggers fresh LLM

module-checks.check-1: python -c "from polza_dashboard import LLM_API_URL, LLM_MODEL, LLM_API_KEY; assert LLM_API_URL.startswith('https://'); assert LLM_MODEL; assert len(LLM_API_KEY) > 20"
module-checks.check-2: curl -s -X POST "$LLM_API_URL" -H "x-api-key: $LLM_API_KEY" -H "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01" -H "content-type: application/json" -d '{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5","max_tokens":20,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"ping"}]}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('type') == 'message' or d.get('role') == 'assistant' or 'content' in d"

scenarios.scenario-1: .env provides LLM_API_URL, LLM_MODEL, LLM_API_KEY; all loaded at startup
scenarios.scenario-2: Direct curl to Anthropic with alias 'claude-haiku-4-5' returns 200 + content[].text
scenarios.scenario-3: Wrong model id (e.g. claude-haiku-4-5-20250414) → 404 with not_found_error body, NOT 401
scenarios.scenario-4: cache_control on system block accepted silently even when prompt < 2048 tokens (cache_creation_input_tokens=0 in usage)

required-log-markers.marker-1: 🧠 LLM config: url=... model=... key=✅ (on startup)

module-checks.check-1: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/generation/summarize -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"generationId":"KNOWN_GEN_ID"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'summary' in d; assert 'topic' in d; assert 'isWork' in d; assert 'llmCost' in d"
module-checks.check-2: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/generation/summarize -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"generationId":"KNOWN_GEN_ID"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['cached']==True"
module-checks.check-3: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/generation-summaries -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"ids":["KNOWN_GEN_ID","UNKNOWN_ID"]}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'KNOWN_GEN_ID' in d['summaries']"
module-checks.check-4: curl -s -X DELETE "http://localhost:5000/api/generation/summary?generationId=KNOWN_GEN_ID" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('ok')==True"

scenarios.scenario-1: First summarize call: LLM invoked, DB row created, cached=false in response
scenarios.scenario-2: Second call without force: cached=true, response <100ms, no LLM log marker
scenarios.scenario-3: force=true: LLM re-invoked, DB row updated, cached=false again
scenarios.scenario-4: Batch endpoint with 50 ids returns only those that are in DB cache
scenarios.scenario-5: Unknown generation_id: Polza log fetch returns 404 → response includes placeholder summary, not 500
scenarios.scenario-6: Anthropic 429 (rate limit): error returned in JSON with details, UI-visible, not crash
scenarios.scenario-7: Phase-4: LLM + embed run in parallel — both PostgreSQL and Qdrant receive data on first call
scenarios.scenario-8: Phase-4: Ollama provider returns valid summary JSON via _parse_llm_json with think:false

module-checks.check-1: curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/provider/config | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'provider' in d; assert 'providers' in d; assert len(d['providers']) >= 2"
module-checks.check-2: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/provider/set -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"provider":"ollama"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('ok')==True"
module-checks.check-3: curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/provider/config | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['provider']=='ollama'"
module-checks.check-4: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/provider/set -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"provider":"anthropic"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('ok')==True"

scenarios.scenario-1: GET /api/provider/config returns both providers with model/cost info
scenarios.scenario-2: POST /api/provider/set switches to ollama — next LLM call uses Ollama native /api/chat
scenarios.scenario-3: POST /api/provider/set switches back to anthropic — next LLM call uses Anthropic Messages API
scenarios.scenario-4: _parse_llm_json extracts valid JSON from Qwen output with <think> tags and markdown fences
scenarios.scenario-5: Invalid provider name in /api/provider/set returns error JSON, not crash
scenarios.scenario-6: Ollama unreachable: _llm_call_ollama returns error, not crash — graceful degradation

module-checks.check-1: curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/embed -d '{"model":"nomic-embed-text-v2-moe:latest","input":"test text"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); e=d['embeddings'][0]; assert len(e)==768; assert all(isinstance(x,float) for x in e[:5])"

scenarios.scenario-1: _embed_text returns 768-dim float vector for valid text input
scenarios.scenario-2: Embedding runs in parallel with LLM call — total time < max(llm_time, embed_time) + small overhead
scenarios.scenario-3: Ollama embed endpoint unreachable — returns None gracefully, PostgreSQL store still succeeds

module-checks.check-1: curl -s http://localhost:6335/collections/Polza_user_logs | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['result']['status']=='green'; assert d['result']['vectors_count']>=0"
module-checks.check-2: curl -s http://localhost:6335/collections/Polza_userls/points/scroll -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"limit":1,"with_payload":true}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); pts=d['result']['points']; assert len(pts)>0; p=pts[0]; assert 'generation_id' in p['payload']; assert 'topic' in p['payload']"

scenarios.scenario-2: _qdrant_upsert stores point with generation_id, topic, session_id, key_name, model, created_at in payload
scenarios.scenario-3: QDRANT_ENABLED=false — _get_qdrant_client returns None, no Qdrant calls, PostgreSQL still works
scenarios.scenario-4: qdrant_client not installed — _get_qdrant_client returns None, no import error crash

module-checks.check-1: curl -s http://localhost:5000/app.js | grep -q 'loadProviderConfig' && echo 'provider config loader present'
module-checks.check-2: curl -s http://localhost:5000/app.js | grep -q 'setProvider' && echo 'provider setter present'
module-checks.check-3: curl -s http://localhost:5000/style.css | grep -q 'provider-toggle' && echo 'provider toggle css present'

scenarios.scenario-1: Sidebar shows radio buttons with 🏠 On-Prem and ☁️ Cloud options on page load
scenarios.scenario-2: Clicking radio switches provider — info labels update with model name and cost estimate
scenarios.scenario-3: AI section shows provider badge (🏠/☁️) and 🔵 Embedded when vector stored

module-checks.check-1: curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/analysis-stats | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'total' in d; assert 'analyzed' in d; assert 'remaining' in d; assert 'job' in d"
module-checks.check-2: PGPASSWORD=bond psql -h localhost -U dbadmin -d polza_dashboard -c "\d analysis_state"
module-checks.check-3: PGPASSWORD=bond psql -h localhost -U dbadmin -d polza_dashboard -c "SELECT id, status, total, done FROM analysis_state WHERE id=1;"

scenarios.scenario-1: analysis_state table exists with singleton row (id=1)
scenarios.scenario-2: GET /api/analysis-stats returns counts matching actual GenerationSummary count
scenarios.scenario-3: After analyze-all start, status changes to 'running'; after stop, to 'paused'

module-checks.check-1: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/provider/set -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"autoAnalyze":true}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('autoAnalyze')==True"

scenarios.scenario-1: New records synced → [AutoAnalyze] N new records to auto-analyze in log
scenarios.scenario-2: autoAnalyze OFF → no auto-analyze after sync
scenarios.scenario-3: Toggle ON at runtime → next sync triggers auto-analyze

module-checks.check-1: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/session/summarize -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"sessionId":"168c4203-32ad-4a0d-97ed-ac7a7ac3a62b"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'summary' in d"

scenarios.scenario-1: First summarize calls LLM and caches result in session_summaries
scenarios.scenario-2: Second summarize returns from cache instantly
scenarios.scenario-3: Invalid session_id returns NO_GENERATIONS error JSON, not crash
scenarios.scenario-4: All generations missing log data returns NO_USER_MESSAGES error

scenarios.scenario-1: Function still importable and returns list when called

module-checks.check-1: curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/employee-report/list | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'employees' in d"

scenarios.scenario-1: Endpoint still responds with employees array when called externally

V-M-EMPLOYEE-UI.notes: UI tab removed. No verification needed.

module-checks.check-1: curl -s http://localhost:5000/ | grep -q 'По темам AI' && echo 'topic tab present'
module-checks.check-2: curl -s http://localhost:5000/app.js | grep -q 'renderAiSection' && echo 'AI section renderer present'
module-checks.check-3: curl -s http://localhost:5000/app.js | grep -q 'bulkAnalyze' && echo 'bulk analyze present'
module-checks.check-5: curl -s http://localhost:5000/style.css | grep -q 'ai-cell-done' && echo 'new css present'

scenarios.scenario-1: Detail modal embeds AI block on top when row clicked
scenarios.scenario-2: Topic grouping tab groups rows by AI topic; unanalyzed fall into "Без AI-анализа"
scenarios.scenario-3: Bulk analyze button triggers parallel LLM calls, progressively updates N/total in button text
scenarios.scenario-4: Session sub-block appears only when generation has session_id

Gate-Phase-1.goal: Employee Report works without AI — instant aggregation from DB for all 12 employees

required-evidence.evidence-1: All 12 employees returned with non-zero cost

Gate-Phase-1.status-note: Passed originally; UI removed in simplify-ui refactor but endpoints retained.

Gate-Phase-2.goal: LLM summarization works — sessions get summaries cached in DB

required-evidence.evidence-1: Summary contains topic and is_work classification

Gate-Phase-2.status-note: Passed. Migrated from Polza proxy to Anthropic native in Phase-3.

Gate-Phase-3.goal: Per-generation AI analysis works end-to-end inside detail modal; topic grouping + bulk analyze functional; all results persist in generation_summaries

commands.command-3: PGPASSWORD=bond psql -h localhost -U dbadmin -d polza_dashboard -c "SELECT generation_id, topic, is_work, llm_cost FROM generation_summaries LIMIT 5;"

required-evidence.evidence-1: First summarize call returns cached=false with full summary + usage metrics
required-evidence.evidence-2: Second call returns cached=true with same data
required-evidence.evidence-3: Batch endpoint returns populated summaries dict for previously-analyzed ids
required-evidence.evidence-4: DB table generation_summaries has rows with llm_cost > 0 and non-empty summary/topic
required-evidence.evidence-5: UI: clicking row opens detail modal with AI block on top; empty state shows "$0.002" cost disclosure
required-evidence.evidence-6: UI: "По темам AI" tab groups analyzed rows by topic; "Без AI-анализа" bucket has bulk-analyze button
required-evidence.evidence-7: Deploy: /home/user/POLZA on VM, branch main, Flask running on port 5000

Gate-Phase-4.goal: Dual LLM provider works (Anthropic + Ollama), embedding pipeline generates 768-dim vectors, Qdrant stores vectors with metadata, provider toggle UI functional, parallel LLM+embed stores in both PostgreSQL and Qdrant

commands.command-5: PGPASSWORD=bond psql -h localhost -U dbadmin -d polza_dashboard -c "SELECT generation_id, topic, llm_model, llm_cost FROM generation_summaries ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 3;"

required-evidence.evidence-1: /api/provider/config returns both anthropic and ollama with model info
required-evidence.evidence-2: Switching to ollama + summarizing a generation works (2-5s response, llm_model in response shows qwen model)
required-evidence.evidence-3: Switching back to anthropic + summarizing works (Haiku model, ~$0.002 cost)
required-evidence.evidence-4: Qdrant collection Polza_user_logs exists with vectors_count > 0, 768-dim cosine
required-evidence.evidence-5: Qdrant point has payload with generation_id, topic, session_id, key_name, model, created_at
required-evidence.evidence-6: PostgreSQL generation_summaries has recent rows with both Anthropic and Ollama model names
required-evidence.evidence-7: UI: sidebar shows provider radio toggle; AI section shows provider badge and 🔵 Embedded indicator
required-evidence.evidence-8: Log shows parallel execution: [GenSummarize][LLM] ok + [Embedding] dim=768 + [Qdrant][upsert] in same request

Gate-Phase-4b.goal: Persistent analyze-all with DB state, auto-analyze on sync, configurable refresh interval, visual analysis status, always-visible stats counter

commands.command-2: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/analyze-all/start | python3 -m json.tool sleep 5 && curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/analysis-stats | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['job']['status'] in ('running','paused')" curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/analyze-all/stop | python3 -m json.tool curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/analysis-stats | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['job']['status']=='paused'" PGPASSWORD=bond psql -h localhost -U dbadmin -d polza_dashboard -c "SELECT status, done, total FROM analysis_state WHERE id=1;"

required-evidence.evidence-1: /api/analysis-stats returns non-zero total, analyzed, remaining counts
required-evidence.evidence-3: Stop pauses job (status=paused in DB), not kills
required-evidence.evidence-4: Start after pause resumes (doesn't restart from zero)
required-evidence.evidence-5: Server restart auto-resumes: 🔄 Resuming analyze-all in log
required-evidence.evidence-6: Auto-analyze triggers on new records when toggle ON
required-evidence.evidence-7: UI: stats counter always visible in topbar, refresh interval dropdown in sidebar
required-evidence.evidence-8: UI: AI column shows 🔄/⏳/🧠/✅ status icons
